title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Bank of India Holdings Services family as a Financial Analyst in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Bank of India Holdings Services:
Bank of India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India Holdings Services!
